Ollin D. Langle

Ollin Demian Langle-Chimal

Data Scientist

  • Download as PDF

I’m from Mexico City and I found myself very passionated about science and arts. I earned a BSc degree in physics from the National Autonomous University of Mexico (UNAM) and have succesfully concluded a MSc in Data Science at the Techonologic Autonomous Institute of Mexico (ITAM). The social and environmental problems are the main focus of my interests

References

Ollin has been my student in three courses in Statistics at the Master’s program in Data Science at Instituto Tecnologico Autonomo de Mexico (ITAM). In all my courses, Ollin has distinguished himself as the best student in the class. From my point of view and experience, Mr. Langle has more than enough academic qualifications for succeeding in an advanced graduate program in Data Sciences or any related field.

Mauricio Garcia Tec

I know Ollin Langle since October of 2015. I adviced his BSc thesis, and during that time he always shown a great interest in the understanding of complex systems, in particular social complex systems.

Jesús Espinal
